description: A targeted flow for users experiencing hip pain, focusing on pressure relief and proper support.

headerContent.headline: Wake Up Without Hip Pain
headerContent.subheadline: Hey, I'm Ashley — and I specialize in helping people wake up without that nagging hip pain. If you've been waking up stiff, sore, or feeling like you barely slept — you're in the right place.
headerContent.avatarIntroScript: I know how frustrating hip pain can be — especially when it starts your day off wrong. The good news? There's almost always a reason, and there's almost always a solution. Let me ask you a few quick questions to understand what's going on.
headerContent.audioNotice: Turn up your volume to hear Ashley

questionContent.questionText: How often do you have trouble falling asleep?

answerOptions.label: Every Night
answerOptions.avatarResponse: I'm sorry to hear that. Having trouble falling asleep every night really takes a toll on your body and mind.

answerOptions.label: Frequently
answerOptions.avatarResponse: You're not alone — many people struggle with falling asleep frequently. Let's figure out what's going on.

answerOptions.label: On Occasion
answerOptions.avatarResponse: That's pretty normal, but we can definitely help you get more consistent, restful sleep.

answerOptions.label: Never
answerOptions.avatarResponse: That's great that falling asleep isn't an issue for you!
answerOptions.terminationMessage: It sounds like you're not experiencing the sleep issues our program is designed to address. If you'd like to explore other ways to optimize your sleep, feel free to reach out to our sleep experts.

questionContent.questionText: Which position do you sleep in the most?

answerOptions.label: On My Side
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Side sleeping is very common, but it puts extra pressure on your hips. The right mattress can relieve that pressure significantly.

answerOptions.label: On My Back
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Back sleeping is excellent for spinal alignment when you have proper lumbar support.

answerOptions.label: On My Stomach
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Stomach sleeping can be tough on your hips and lower back. The right mattress can make a big difference.

answerOptions.label: It Varies
answerOptions.avatarResponse: A combination sleeper! You need a mattress that adapts to all your positions throughout the night.

questionContent.questionText: How often does motion or tossing and turning in bed wake you up or prevent you from falling asleep?

answerOptions.label: Never
answerOptions.avatarResponse: That's great — motion transfer isn't disrupting your sleep.

answerOptions.label: Occasionally
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Some motion disturbance is normal, especially if you share a bed.

answerOptions.label: Regularly
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Regular motion disturbance can seriously impact your sleep quality. That's something we can definitely address.

answerOptions.label: I'm Not Sure
answerOptions.avatarResponse: That's okay — sometimes it's hard to know what's waking you up. We'll factor that in.

questionContent.questionText: How often do you wake with aches and pains?

answerOptions.label: Every Night
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Waking up in pain every day is exhausting. Your mattress should be helping you recover, not causing more problems.

answerOptions.label: Frequently
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Frequent aches and pains are a clear sign your sleep setup needs attention.

answerOptions.label: On Occasion
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Even occasional pain is worth addressing. You deserve to wake up feeling great every day.

answerOptions.label: Never
answerOptions.avatarResponse: That's wonderful that you're not experiencing morning pain!
answerOptions.terminationMessage: It sounds like aches and pains aren't your main concern. If you'd like to explore other ways to optimize your sleep, feel free to reach out to our sleep experts.

questionContent.questionText: Which of the following is most true for your aches & pains?

answerOptions.label: Spinal surgery, chronic condition, or bad injury
answerOptions.avatarResponse: I understand you're dealing with something more serious. The right mattress support is even more critical for you.

answerOptions.label: Stiffness or Soreness
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Stiffness and soreness are often signs of poor sleep posture or inadequate support.

answerOptions.label: Hip or Shoulder Discomfort
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Hip discomfort is exactly what brought you here. That usually comes from pressure points — and that's exactly what the right mattress can fix.

answerOptions.label: None of the above
answerOptions.avatarResponse: Thanks for letting me know.
answerOptions.terminationMessage: Based on your answers, it seems like our sleep solutions might not be the best fit for your specific situation. We recommend consulting with a healthcare professional about your sleep concerns.

avatarContent.scriptText: Based on what you've told me, I can see exactly what's happening. Your current sleep setup isn't giving your hips the pressure relief they need. That's why you're waking up with that hip pain.
avatarContent.secondaryScriptText: The good news is that this is completely fixable. Tempur-Pedic mattresses are specifically designed to adapt to your body, relieve pressure points — especially at the hips — and keep your spine properly aligned all night long.
avatarContent.tertiaryScriptText: Thousands of people with similar hip pain have found relief with these mattresses. Let me show you my top recommendations based on your specific needs.

ctaContent.headline: Your Personalized Sleep Solutions
ctaContent.bodyText: Based on your sleep profile, I've selected Tempur-Pedic mattresses specifically designed to relieve hip pain and pressure points. These recommendations have helped thousands of people wake up feeling truly rested.

emailCaptureContent.promptText: Want me to send you a personalized sleep report?
emailCaptureContent.avatarResponseOnSubmit: Perfect! I'll send that right over. Check your inbox for your personalized recommendations.
emailCaptureContent.skipOptionText: No thanks, just show me the mattresses
emailCaptureContent.avatarResponseOnSkip: No problem! Let's take a look at your recommendations.
